commands.review_summary:
The PR adds `SendMessage`, `content`, and `text` aliases to `sessions_send`, normalizes them to canonical `message`, and adds focused session tool tests.

PR surface: Source +12, Tests +39. Total +51 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main requires `message` in the TypeBox schema and validates arguments before execution, so the provided `SendMessage`-only call shape is source-reproducible as a validation rejection.

target.title: fix #88146: [Bug]: send_to_task rejects model-generated `SendMessage` body instead of normalizing to `message` (A2A broken for Anthropic/Pi agents; sibling of #84079)
target.body:
## Summary

- Fixes #88146.
- Allows `sessions_send` / `send_to_task` to accept model-emitted body aliases: `SendMessage`, `content`, and `text`.
- Normalizes the first non-empty alias to canonical `message` before the existing send path runs, while keeping explicit `message` precedence.

## Real behavior proof

- **Behavior or issue addressed:** `send_to_task` rejected Anthropic/Pi-style `SendMessage` arguments before execution because the tool schema required a literal `message` property.
- **Real environment tested:** Patched worktree `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-worktrees/issue-88146`; isolated OpenClaw dev gateway on `ws://127.0.0.1:19011`; isolated `OPENCLAW_HOME=/tmp/openclaw-dev-issue-88146`.
- **Exact steps or command run after this patch:** Started the dev gateway with `OPENCLAW_REPO=$TASK_WORKTREE OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT=19011`; ran `node openclaw.mjs --dev gateway call health --url ws://127.0.0.1:19011 --token mytoken123 --json`; ran `$EVIDENCE_DIR/sessions-send-alias-proof.ts`, which calls the patched `sessions_send` tool with `SendMessage` and no canonical `message`, then uses real `callGateway` against the running gateway; ran `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts`.
- **Evidence after fix:** `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/openclaw-real-behavior-proof.md`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/openclaw-start.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/openclaw-dev-gateway.log`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/sessions-send-alias-proof.json`; `/media/vdc/code/ai/aispace/openclaw-issue-88146-evidence/vitest-openclaw-tools-sessions.txt`.
- **Observed result after fix:** Runtime proof output shows `schemaAllowsMissingMessage: true`, `schemaHasSendMessageAlias: true`, gateway methods `sessions.resolve`, `sessions.create`, and `agent`, final status `accepted`, session key `agent:main:main`, and a returned run id.
- **What was not tested:** A live Anthropic/Pi model naturally choosing the alias was not tested; the proof injects the exact rejected `SendMessage` tool-call shape from the issue and verifies patched tool plus real gateway acceptance.
- **Target test file:** `src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts`

## Regression Test Plan

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run --config test/vitest/vitest.agents.config.ts src/agents/openclaw-tools.sessions.test.ts`
- `daily_fix.sh prepush`

## Root Cause

- **Root cause:** `sessions_send` required `message` in its TypeBox schema, so calls carrying model-generated aliases failed schema validation before `execute` could run. The alias normalization added for the channel `message` tool did not cover the agent-to-agent sessions send tool.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt
